headline: Assessing Masco (MAS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Masco (MAS) has drawn attention after recent share price pressure, with the stock down about 22% over the past month and 8% over the past 3 months. This has prompted closer scrutiny of its fundamentals. The company, headquartered in Livonia, Michigan, provides home improvement and building products across Plumbing Products and Decorative Architectural Products. It generates US$7.6b in revenue and US$810m in net income across North America,...

headline: Masco Corporation Announces Date for Earnings Release and Conference Call for 2026 First Quarter
summary: LIVONIA, Mich., March 23, 2026--Masco Corporation (NYSE: MAS) will hold a conference call regarding its 2026 first quarter results on Wednesday, April 22 at 8:00 a.m. ET, hosted by President and Chief Executive Officer, Jon Nudi. To join, dial (800) 715-9871 or (646) 307-1963 and enter conference ID 3880732. Please register five to ten minutes before the call begins.
